strName.description: The code name of the crime entry.

strLaw.description: Jurisdiction / law authority code (CCRE, OKLG, etc.). Enum-like; not currently a strName reference to any data folder.

strCrime.description: Crime category enum (damage, theft, ...). Enum tag, not a strName reference.

strLootCondsPerp.description: Loot table applied to the perpetrator (commonly applies arrest/penalty conditions). Refers to entry within loot.json.

strPledge.description: Pledge enacted on the perpetrator (e.g. arrest behavior). Refers to entry within pledges.json.
